privileged_info_summary: This task uses synthetic clinical trial data created programmatically in setup_task.sh. The input file is a 6-column × 7-row demographics table with treatment groups 'Placebo' (N=142) and 'Sarilumab' (N=138) containing clinical measures: Age, BMI, Duration of RA, CRP, DAS28-CRP, and HAQ-DI Score. The task requires formatting this table to academic standards by: (1) merging header cells for 'Placebo' and 'Sarilumab' group labels spanning columns 1-2 and 3-4 respectively, (2) applying decimal tab stops to numerical columns (indices 1-5), and (3) applying APA-style borders (removing vertical lines, thick top/bottom borders, thin header underline). All file paths, column indices, and merge labels specified in metadata are verified correct.
